description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable image with a docker:27-dind service, defines the stages test, deploy, and trigger, and sets global variables such as IMAGE_NAME, UV_VERSION, PYTHON_VERSION, and BASE_LAYER. In the test stage add a build job that runs only on master, staging, dev, and tags, executes "docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com", builds the image "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME//\//-}" with the build argument IGNORE_DEV_DEPS=true, and pushes it. Also in the test stage add a test job that uses the image "ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:$UV_VERSION-python$PYTHON_VERSION-$BASE_LAYER", caches the directory defined by $UV_CACHE_DIR keyed by uv.lock, installs gcc and related libs, runs "uv sync --frozen --no-install-project --all-extras", then "uv run ./manage.py test" and finally "uv cache prune --ci", while providing a postgres:17 service and relevant DATABASE_URL and other Django variables. In the deploy stage add tag_dev, tag_staging, and tag_prod jobs that each log in to the registry, pull the built image, retag it to "${IMAGE_NAME}:dev", "${IMAGE_NAME}:staging", or "${IMAGE_NAME}:latest" respectively, push the retagged image, and run only on the dev, staging, or master branches with the corresponding environment. Finally, in the trigger stage add a trigger job that runs only on master, installs curl with "apk add --no-cache curl", and posts a pipeline trigger request to the GitLab API using the $TRIGGER_TOKEN.
